data.name: Fatal
data.benefits: Gain 5% extra Crit Chance and 10% extra Crit Damage

data.name: Wilderness Blessing
data.benefits: Extra Movement Speed in Jungle and River
data.description: Moevement Speed in the Jungle and River is increased by 10%. This bonus is halved when in combat with enemy heroes, Lord or Turtle.

data.name: Seasoned Hunter
data.description: Damage against Lord and Turtle is increased by 15%. This bonus is halved against regular Creeps and doesn't affect the damage of Retribution.

data.name: Tenacity
data.description: When HP is below 50%, Physical and Magic Defense is increased by 15

data.name: Master Assassin
data.description: If there is only one enemy hero nearby, damage dealt to them is increased by 7%

data.name: Bargain Hunter
data.description: Equipment can be purchased at 95% of their base price

data.name: Festival of Blood
data.description: Gain 6% Spell Vamp. Each hero kill or assist grants an additional 0.5% Spell Vamp, up to 8 stacks.

data.name: Pull Yourself Together
data.benefits: Reduce Battle Spell & Active Equipment CD
data.description: Cooldowns of Battle Spells and equipment's active skills are reduced by 15%

data.name: Weapon Master
data.description: Physical Attack and Magic Power gained from equipment, emblem, talents, and skills are increased by 5%

data.name: Impure Rage
data.benefits: Extra Skill Damage & Restore Mana on Hit
data.description: Dealing damage with skills deals 4% of target's Max HP as extra Adaptive Damage and restores 2% Mana on hit

data.name: Quantum Charge
data.benefits: Basic Attacks Grant HP Regen & Speed Up
data.description: Dealing damage with Basic Attacks increases Movement Speed by 30% for 1.5s and restores 75-180 HP (scales with level)

data.name: War Cry
data.description: After every 3 separate Basic Attacks or skills hit an enemy hero, all damage dealt increases by 8% for 6s

data.name: Temporal Reign
data.description: The next Ultimate cast decreases other active skills remaining cooldowns by 1.5 times within 4s

data.name: Concussive Blast
data.description: After the next Basic Attack, deal 100(+7% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies

data.name: Killing Spree
data.benefits: Regen and Speed Up After Kill
data.description: After killing an enemy hero, instantly recover 15% of Lost HP and gain 20% Movement Speed

data.name: Lethal Ignition
data.description: Dealing damage greater than 7% of an enemy hero's Max HP 3 times within 5s will scorch the target for an additional 162-750 Adaptive Damage (scales with level)

data.name: Brave Smite
data.description: Dealing skill damage to an enemy hero recovers 5% of Max HP

data.name: Focusing Mark
data.description: Dealing damage to an enemy hero increase allied heroes damage to them by 6% for 3s

data.name: Weakness Finder
data.description: Basic Attacks slow enemies by 50% and reduce their Attack Speed by 30%
